description: The Yüksekova Gang was an illegal organization based in the Yüksekova district of Hakkari Province, Turkey, accused of killing 16 people. It had apparent links to the Turkish Gendarmerie's JITEM unit and possible links to the Ergenekon organization. The gang smuggled drugs and weapons, and its activities were first revealed in 1996 after the Susurluk scandal. Legal cases against the gang were sent to the European Court of Human Rights.
